songs.title: Nice Guys Finish Last
feed: “Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.

“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 5 spots to #1.
“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 60 sales units.

“Nice Guys Finish Last” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 255,507 total units.
